workspaceInbox.heroTitle: Everything that needs attention — in one place.
workspaceInbox.heroSubtitle: The work inbox shows only what needs a decision, follow‑up, or action right now.
workspaceInbox.prioritySubtitle: Items ordered by impact on work, cash, and data quality.
workspaceInbox.priorityEmpty: No urgent items right now. You can continue routine work.
workspaceInbox.dueSoonEmpty: No upcoming billing items right now.

workspaceOperations.heroTitle: Operations that align team, field, documents, and billing in one clear flow.
workspaceOperations.heroSubtitle: Instead of jumping between screens, see what’s healthy, what’s stuck, and which workflow needs attention so work keeps moving. Currently scoped to {org}.
workspaceOperations.zonesEmpty: No active reporting zones yet. Start from the Meckano screen.
workspaceOperations.zonesEmptyWithTrade: No active reporting zones for {trade} yet. Start from the Meckano screen.
workspaceOperations.recentEmptyWithTrade: No recent activity to show for {trade} right now.

workspaceClients.heroTitle: A {clients} hub for status, search, pipeline, and action in one place.
workspaceClients.heroSubtitle: Your main station for {clients}: pipeline at a glance, fast filters, billing or documents — without getting lost in a giant screen.
workspaceClients.statPipelineValueHint: Open opportunity value across the visible clients
workspaceClients.statOpenCollectionHint: Current open amount linked to the visible clients
workspaceClients.statActiveProjectsHint: How many active projects currently drive commercial work
workspaceClients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, phone, or project
workspaceClients.emptyFilterTitle: No clients match the current filters.
workspaceClients.emptyFilterBody: Change the search or open advanced CRM for deeper work.
workspaceClients.missingAllOk: All visible clients have full contact details.
workspaceClients.openBillingEmpty: No clients with open billing in the current filter.

projectsHub.emptyDescription: Try another name or include archived projects. Create a new project and link clients to it.

projectDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? Clients will be unlinked from it.
projectDetail.clientsEmptyBody: Add clients from the pipeline or link an existing client to track pipeline, billing and documents in one place.
projectDetail.expensesEmpty: No expenses linked to this project.
projectDetail.issuedEmpty: No issued documents for clients on this project.

clientQuickForm.createSuccess: Client created and added to the pipeline

workspaceClients.financeImpactTitle: How much your clients bring in
workspaceClients.topRevenueEmpty: No clients with active billing yet.

aiInsight.empty: Your list is clean. No gaps or anomalies.

workspaceFinance.heroSubtitle: Cash flow, issued documents, collections, and expenses — synced with clients and projects.
workspaceFinance.wizardSubtitle: Tax invoice, receipt, invoice-receipt, and credit note — with optional CRM client link.
workspaceFinance.draftsSectionSubtitle: Work logs, approvals, and scans that are not yet a tax invoice.
workspaceFinance.issuedSearchPlaceholder: Search by client, number, or type
workspaceFinance.issuedEmptySubtitle: Use the document generator to issue an invoice, receipt, invoice-receipt, or credit note and link it to a client.
workspaceFinance.issuedEmptySearchSubtitle: Try searching by client name, document number, project, or document type.
workspaceFinance.expenseScannerHint: After scanning a vendor invoice below, record the expense here or save a draft for review.
workspaceFinance.expensesEmptySubtitle: Add a manual expense or scan a vendor invoice to create a review draft.
workspaceFinance.collectionClientsEmptySubtitle: When tax invoices or invoice-receipts stay open, the most important clients will appear here.
workspaceFinance.collectionProjectsEmptySubtitle: Projects will receive a collection view once documents are linked to clients and projects.
workspaceFinance.statPendingCollectionHint: Open amount across clients and pending issued documents
workspaceFinance.flowSubtitle: One bar shows what is already paid, what is open for collection, and what is still in the client pipeline.
workspaceFinance.flowFootnote: Forecast is driven by client status and opportunity value, not only by issued documents.
workspaceFinance.statBillingPendingHint: {count} tax invoices / invoice-receipts not yet paid (excludes raw scans)
workspaceFinance.statDraftDocumentsHint: Scan/ERP items — complete data or issue a customer invoice
workspaceFinance.linkedClientsSubtitle: The clients with the biggest impact on cash right now. Continue to clients, documents, or AI from here.
workspaceFinance.linkedClientsEmpty: No standout clients with open collection right now.
workspaceFinance.projectsSubtitle: See the link between project, client load, and collection so the finance screen reflects commercial reality.
workspaceFinance.projectsEmpty: No standout projects with open collection right now.
workspaceFinance.erpCardBody: Open documents, statuses, and collection workflows.
workspaceFinance.issueCardBody: Create invoices, proposals, and issued documents from the commercial context.
workspaceFinance.clientsSupportTitle: Who is bringing in and who owes
workspaceFinance.footerHint: Your finances link directly to clients and projects — no screen gaps. AI reads everything and explains.

aiInsight.pending: {count} open-status documents ({amount}) — may include non-invoice items
aiInsight.billingOnly: Tax invoices / invoice-receipts waiting for payment: {count} ({amount})
aiInsight.draftsOnly: Scan/workflow items waiting to be completed: {count}
aiInsight.empty: Clean cash flow — no major anomalies.

workspaceAiHub.title: Unified AI hub
workspaceAiHub.subtitle: Scanning, contextual assistant, and insights all sit on the same layer of clients, finance, and documents.
workspaceAiHub.heroTitle: Scan, decode, document research, and smart issuance — in one place
workspaceAiHub.heroSubtitle: Tailored to {industry}: scan into the system, chat over PDFs you upload (notebook), manage decoded docs, and issue from professional templates.
workspaceAiHub.sectionScanSubtitle: Upload and AI extraction — documents enter the org and appear under Scanned.
workspaceAiHub.sectionNotebookSubtitle: Add PDFs for a grounded chat. This does not replace org scanning — use it for quick analysis of external files.
workspaceAiHub.sectionDecodeSubtitle: Scanned and issued — search, filter, edit, and link to clients.
workspaceAiHub.sectionGeneratorsSubtitle: Templates from your profile — official issue flow or a draft in issued documents.
workspaceAiHub.assistantBody: The unified AI bubble is available from every workspace screen through the dock. It uses the same commercial context across clients, projects, cash flow, and documents.
workspaceAiHub.assistantHint: For a fast answer, a commercial insight, or direct scanner access, open the assistant from the dock.
workspaceAiHub.scannerBody: The scanner board uses the same engines and the same AI layer — no split between AI, documents, and operations.
workspaceAiHub.automationsBody: Rules AI runs in the background to connect clients and finance — reminders, alerts, and triggers.
workspaceAiHub.aiBridgeInsight: This is where AI connects what happens with clients to what happens with finance, producing insights that move the business.
workspaceAiHub.axisConnectionsBody: AI reads the same data layer across all axes — clients, finance, and documents — and ties them into one story.
workspaceAiHub.previewScanEmpty: Upload a file and run a scan to see extraction and preview here.
workspaceAiHub.previewNotebookEmpty: Send a message in the notebook to see the reply here.
workspaceAiHub.previewLibraryEmpty: Select a document from the list for a summary here.
workspaceAiHub.hubGeneratorsAiSubtitle: Profile templates create a draft or issuance flow; below — a freeform draft from a short brief (not professional advice).
workspaceAiHub.docDraftHint: Describe what you need in a few sentences. The result is a Hebrew helper draft only.
workspaceAiHub.docDraftPlaceholder: e.g. Quote for a flat renovation including milestones and payment terms…
workspaceAiHub.docDraftError: Could not generate a draft right now.

workspaceInsights.heroTitle: Insights that show what the system already knows — and what to do next.
workspaceInsights.heroSubtitle: Instead of a disconnected AI screen, insights tie to billing, documents, clients, and pipeline — short, clear, and actionable.
workspaceInsights.executiveSubtitle: One place for summary and recommended actions — instead of many dashboards.
workspaceInsights.emptyRecsBody: Core flows look calm. Continue routine work in clients, documents, or billing.
workspaceInsights.pendingEmpty: No standout clients with open billing right now.

workspaceDocuments.heroTitle: Full control of {documents} — view, edit, and delete.
workspaceDocuments.heroSubtitle: This screen adapts to {industry}, shows the document types and approvals relevant to the trade, and gives full control over both scanned and issued documents.
workspaceDocuments.generatorsSubtitle: Templates from your industry profile — official issue flow or a draft in issued documents.
workspaceDocuments.generatorsSuccessDraft: Draft created — check the Issued tab.
workspaceDocuments.statsGroupAria: Document status summary in AI hub
workspaceDocuments.searchPlaceholder: Search by client, vendor, file, document type, or number
workspaceDocuments.emptyScannedTitle: No scanned documents match the current filters.
workspaceDocuments.emptyScannedBody: Try changing the search or start a new scan to upload another document.
workspaceDocuments.emptyIssuedTitle: No issued documents match the current filters.
workspaceDocuments.emptyIssuedBody: Go to the issue screen and create a new document for the selected trade and flow.
workspaceDocuments.sidebarVendorsEmpty: No vendors detected in scanned documents yet.

fallbacks.noSummary: No summary available for this document yet.

parseErrors.minLines: Enter at least one line item.
parseErrors.descRequired: Each line must start with an item description.
parseErrors.qtyPrice: Quantity and price must be valid numbers.

errors.saveIssued: Could not save the issued document.
errors.deleteIssued: Could not delete the issued document.

workspaceSettings.centerAsideSubtitle: Organization, profession, engines, operations, and subscription — grouped by responsibility.
workspaceSettings.centerNavHint: Pick a section in the menu

workspaceBilling.heroSubtitle: Scan packages, licensing, and payment details for {organizationName}.
